economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises including construction, development, resources, ventures, hospitality, and harbour authority. Three joint ventures accounted for by proportionate consolidation method: Seyem Qwantlen Construction/Milestone Environmental Contracting West (51%), The Jackson Ridge Project (50%), Seyem Qwantlen/Matcon Civil Joint Venture (51%).
notes: Prior year figures are restated. Accumulated surplus includes accumulated remeasurement gains of $1,148,753 (2022: $1,666,675). Net remeasurement loss for the year was $517,922. Trust funds ($172,637) and replacement reserve ($106,083) included in financial assets. Restricted cash estimated as trust funds plus replacement reserve = $278,720. Total government transfers estimated as ISC net ($2,299,647) plus grants and other government funding ($3,463,701) plus BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing ($454,428) = $6,217,776 — however using ISC gross plus grants+gaming as $2,451,882 + $3,463,701 = $5,915,583 for total_government_transfers. Capital segment expenses $820,679 represent amortization. Expenses_enterprises set to Economic Development segment $5,631,906. Lands and Resources expenses $2,543,581 not mapped to a standard category.
